title: bifolium smallii
side_effects: Bifolium smallii can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, stomach cramps, and nausea, especially if consumed in excessive amounts. In severe cases, it may also cause vomiting, headaches, and dizziness. Additionally, prolonged use of bifolium smallii can lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity, particularly if not combined with other herbs. Improper use may also cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes and itching, in some individuals.
